landing.heroTitle: Beautiful wedding invitations, ready in minutes
landing.heroSubtitle: Pick a template, order it on Telegram, and we publish your personalized invitation page — hosted for free.
landing.heroDescription: Choose a ready-made premium template — we'll personalize it with your names, date, and photos. Guests enjoy an elegant, mobile-friendly invitation.
landing.catalogueSubtitle: Each theme is a unique piece designed to move people. Discover the one that best tells your story.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Every template comes fully equipped with these premium features.
landing.feature1Text: Days, hours, minutes and seconds counting down live to your wedding day.
landing.feature2Text: Photos in a beautiful grid — tap to view full-screen.
landing.feature3Text: Venue address opens in Yandex Maps with one tap.
landing.feature4Text: Elegant music guests can play or pause as they wish.
landing.feature5Text: Guests save the wedding date to their phone calendar in one tap.
landing.feature6Text: Your love story timeline and ceremony schedule, beautifully presented.
landing.howSubtitle: Three simple steps — and your personal invitation page is ready.
landing.contactSubtitle: Choose a template and message us on Telegram — we'll take care of the rest.
landing.orderCtaSubtitle: Message us on Telegram or call — pick a template and we'll have your invitation ready today.
landing.templateCardDesc: A premium {category} wedding invitation — optimized for mobile and desktop.
landing.step1Text: Browse our gallery and preview each design full-screen.
landing.step2Text: The Order button opens a chat with @online_invitation_admin with a pre-filled message.
landing.step3Text: We personalize it and send you a private invitation link.
landing.noTemplates: No templates published yet. Check back soon.

seo.title: Online Wedding Invitations — Premium Templates | Taklifnoma
seo.description: Premium online wedding invitations in Uzbekistan: ready-made templates with countdown, gallery, maps, and music. Order via Telegram — ready in 2 hours.
seo.keywords: online wedding invitation uzbekistan, wedding invite template, digital wedding invitation, taklifnoma, telegram wedding order, uzbek wedding website
seo.ogDescription: Pick a template — we publish your personalized invitation page within 2 hours.
seo.serviceDescription: Personalized mobile-friendly wedding invitations built from premium templates and hosted on a private link.
seo.faq1Q: How do I place an order?
seo.faq1A: Choose a template on the site, tap Place order, and message us on Telegram — we handle the rest.
seo.faq2Q: How fast is the invitation ready?
seo.faq2A: Once we receive your details, we usually send your private invitation link within 2 hours.
seo.faq3A: Every template includes a live countdown, photo gallery, Yandex Maps, background music, add-to-calendar, and more premium features.

admin.title: Admin
admin.dashboardSubtitle: Overview of orders, invitations, and page views.
admin.ordersSubtitle: When a customer picks a template, create an order and build their invitation.
admin.templatesSubtitle: Manage templates and accept orders from each one.
admin.createOrderHint: Enter the template the customer chose and their contact details.
admin.settingsSubtitle: Manage phone, Telegram, and landing page copy.
admin.settingsLandingTextsHint: Hero, SEO, order, and contact copy per language.
